trivia: The 30-seat turboprop that put Embraer on the world map in the 1980s. Passenger examples are rare now, but cargo-converted Brasilias still buzz through regional night networks.
A T-tail, twin PW118s and honest 1980s lines: catching one is catching a piece of Embraer's origin story.
funFacts: Many survivors now fly small-package cargo.
